rEDGE 0.2.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

rEDGE 0.2.1

  • Extinction probability (ext.prob) based on categories now fitted with a curve rather than a lm(). Some issues regarding IUCN50/IUCN100/IUCN500 scenarios fixed.

rEDGE 0.2.0

  • Functions calculate_EDGE1() and calculate_EDGE2() able to work with ‘phylo’ and ‘multiPhylo’ objects
  • Wrapper function able to use EDGE1 in phylo and multiphylo; and EDGE2 as phylo, multiPhylo; and adding multiple iterations
  • PDi (Phylogenetic Diversity indicator) developed
  • Data included: monotremes (Upham et al. 2019; UICN Red List 2025), and cycad data (Forest et al., 2017 and assessments for RLI 2003&2014)

rEDGE 0.1.0

  • First release.

Contents

Developed by Ignacio Ramos-Gutierrez, Sebastian Pipins, Felix Forest, Matilda Brown, Steven Bachman, Rikki Gumbs.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
